access_token_validity.description: The validity duration of the access token in seconds.

allowed_oauth_flows.description: The OAuth flows that are allowed for this client.

allowed_oauth_flows_user_pool_client.description: Indicates whether the client is allowed to use OAuth flows with the user pool.

allowed_oauth_scopes.description: The OAuth scopes that are allowed for this client.

analytics_configuration.description: Configuration for analytics logging related to this client.

callback_urls.description: A list of allowed callback URLs for the client.

default_redirect_uri.description: The default redirect URI for the client.

enable_propagate_additional_user_context.description: Indicates whether additional user context data should be propagated.

enable_token_revocation.description: Indicates whether token revocation is enabled for the client.

explicit_auth_flows.description: The authentication flows that are explicitly allowed for this client.

generate_secret.description: Indicates whether a secret is generated for the client.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user pool client.

id_token_validity.description: The validity duration of the ID token in seconds.

logout_urls.description: A list of allowed logout URLs for the client.

name.description: The name of the user pool client.

prevent_user_existence_errors.description: Prevents user existence errors during sign-in attempts.

read_attributes.description: A list of user attributes that the client can read.

refresh_token_validity.description: The validity duration of the refresh token in seconds.

supported_identity_providers.description: The identity providers that are supported for this client.

token_validity_units.description: The units of time for the validity of tokens.

write_attributes.description: A list of user attributes that the client can write.
